title: Police NPC
description: Spawn tactical male & female police officers to defend you from monsters. Arm them with 3D revolvers or batons, and tame them with donuts...
body:
# Police NPC Mod

Tired of dealing with zombies and creepers alone? **Police NPC Mod** lets you hire your own tactical Male and Female Police Officers to back you up, secure your base, and watch your back 24/7.

---

### What Can These Officers Do?

* **Your Ultimate Bodyguards:** If a monster attacks you, or if you punch ANY mob (even a villager or iron golem), your police squad will instantly lock onto them and open fire.
* **Tame Them with Donuts:** Craft delicious **Pink Frosted Donuts** in your survival world. Feed them to a wild officer to gain their eternal loyalty!
* **Change Their Orders (3 Modes):** Right-click an officer with an empty hand to switch their duties on the fly:
  * **Follow Me:** They trail behind you like a tactical K9 unit.
  * **Stand Ground:** They stay exactly where they are, acting as permanent base turrets.
  * **Patrol Area:** They wander around naturally, hunting down any monster that enters their sight.
* **Give Them a Gun (Ranged Mode):** Hand them a **Police Revolver** to turn them into sharpshooters. They will raise their weapon, lock onto targets, and blast monsters away with high-speed bullet bursts and custom sound effects.
* **Hand Them a Cop Baton (Melee Mode):** Give them a **Police Baton** instead! They’ll sprint at monsters and smack them with nearly triple their normal fist damage, complete with satisfying "whoosh" and "crit" swing sounds.
* **No Friendly Fire:** Your officers work as a professional team. No matter how chaotic the shootout gets, they will never accidentally shoot or hurt each other.
* **Multiplayer Safe:** Officers only obey their true owner. If another player tries to give orders to your cop, they will get a text notification: *"I am not under your command!"* If you try to order a wild cop without a donut, they will tell you: *"Feed me a donut first!"*

---

### How to Craft Donuts (Survival Recipe)
Open your standard Crafting Table and place:
* **Top Row:** 3x Sugar
* **Middle Row:** 1x Wheat (in the center)
* **Bottom Row:** 1x Milk Bucket (in the center)
*(Gives you 2 Donuts, and you get your empty Milk Bucket back!)*

---

### Where to Find Mod Items?
Everything is neatly tucked inside its own dedicated **"Police Mod Pack"** tab in your Creative Menu, featuring clean English item names and properly colored spawn eggs.

---

### How to Get the Police Officers?
* **Currently Spawned via Creative Mode:** For now, officers do not spawn naturally in the world. You can easily spawn them using the **Male Officer Spawn Egg** or **Female Officer Spawn Egg** found inside the custom creative tab.
* **Survival Compatibility:** If you are playing in a Survival world, make sure you have **Cheats Enabled** to give yourself the spawn eggs via the `/give` command or by switching to Creative mode temporarily!
